data.title: Safety and Pharmacokinetics of Valganciclovir Syrup Formulation in Pediatric Solid Organ Transplant Recipients
data.country: Australia, Spain, France, Canada, Germany, United States, Mexico
data.brief_summary: This study will assess the safety and pharmacokinetics of Valcyte syrup in pediatric solid organ transplant recipients. The anticipated time on study treatment is 3-12 months and the target sample size is less than 100 individuals.
endpoints: Mean Area Under the Concentration-Time Curve From 0 to 24 Hours of Valganciclovir
Number of Participants With Adverse Events Leading to Dose Interruption or Modification
Number of Participants With Opportunistic Infections
